profile.name: Keshav kumar Choudhary
profile.headline: Software developer specializing in AI chatbot integration, agentic AI, and MERN stack products.
profile.summary: I build production-ready web applications with React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and modern AI integrations. My focus is turning chatbot and agent workflows into reliable product features with clean interfaces and maintainable APIs.
profile.about: With 1.5 years of software development experience, I work across frontend, backend, and AI integration layers. I enjoy designing reusable React components, building API-first MERN systems, and connecting LLM-powered chatbots and agentic workflows to practical business use cases.
profile.availability: Available for full-stack and AI integration roles
profile.contactNote: Share the problem, product flow, or integration goal. I can help turn it into a clear MERN implementation with thoughtful AI behavior.

focusAreas.title: AI chatbot integration
focusAreas.description: Integrating LLM-powered chat experiences with backend APIs, business data, prompts, and practical user flows.

focusAreas.title: Agentic AI workflows
focusAreas.description: Designing task-oriented agent flows for automation, tool calling, multi-step reasoning, and assisted operations.

focusAreas.title: MERN applications
focusAreas.description: Building responsive React interfaces, REST APIs, authentication-ready backends, and MongoDB data models.

experience.title: Software Developer
highlights: Built responsive React interfaces using reusable components and data-driven rendering patterns.
Integrated AI chatbot experiences with backend APIs to support guided conversations and user actions.
Developed Express.js APIs and MongoDB models for scalable CRUD workflows and application state.
Worked on agentic AI concepts including structured prompts, tool-style workflows, and multi-step automation.

projects.name: Amalgamate
projects.description: Built and shipped a polling platform with AI-generated posts, polling topics, and multi-option questions; focused on reusable UI components, API integration, Redux state management, Firebase auth, and OAuth-based onboarding.

projects.name: Virilocity
projects.description: Built Virilocity, a multi-tenant AI marketing automation platform featuring 39 specialized agents, Claude model routing, responsible AI fairness controls, enterprise SaaS auth/billing, and integrations with HubSpot, Microsoft 365, Stripe, Azure Marketplace, Neon, and MCP.

projects.name: Hound Heart
projects.description: Developed the frontend for an AI-powered dog wellness analysis platform that processes user-shared data to generate insights, with API integrations and Redux-driven state management for a smooth diagnostic workflow.

projects.name: Talent Scope
projects.description: Built a movement session management platform with a multi-role login system, Zoom-powered sessions, API integrations, and Redux-based workflow management for smooth admin and learner experiences.

projects.name: KEHi
projects.description: Converted the web app into a mobile APK using Capacitor, implemented in-app purchases for iOS and Android, and supported an AI receptionist that answers calls, captures leads, and books appointments 24/7.

services.title: Chatbot integration
services.description: Add AI assistants to web apps with thoughtful prompts, clean UI states, and backend-connected actions.

services.title: MERN development
services.description: Build full-stack features using React, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and maintainable component structures.

services.title: Agent workflows
services.description: Prototype agentic flows for multi-step tasks, automation, research assistance, and internal tools.
